questions.question: What wildlife protection and habitat conservation regulations apply in this area, and how are they enforced?
questions.answer: Not specified in the statute. The discovered source only describes the Town of Mt. Pleasant Natural Resource Inventory (NRI) and the Conservation Advisory Council’s advisory role in protecting the environment. It identifies wildlife- and habitat-related resources to be inventoried (e.g., wetlands, forests, wildlife, rare plant and animal species, significant biodiversity areas), but it does not set out enforceable wildlife protection or habitat conservation regulations, permits, penalties, or enforcement procedures.
vectorResearchSuggestions: Town of Mt. Pleasant zoning code or land development regulations
Town of Mt. Pleasant environmental conservation or wetlands protection local law
Town Board ordinances on habitat, tree, or wildlife protection
Conservation Advisory Council enabling local law or charter provisions
